enonce.texte:
Read the brochure below and answer the questions that follow.

SUNNY HILLS HOTEL

Location: 123 Peace Avenue, Yaoundé

Accommodation Types:

  • Single Room: 15,000 CFA per night
  • Double Room: 25,000 CFA per night
  • Suite: 45,000 CFA per night (includes breakfast and Wi-Fi)

Services: 24-hour security, air conditioning, restaurant, swimming pool, free parking, laundry service

Contact: 699-555-1234 or email: info@sunnyhillshotel.cm

Note: 10% discount for stays of 5 nights or more.
images: A modern hotel building with a swimming pool and palm trees, showing a sign 'Sunny Hills Hotel'.

questions.texte: What is the name of the hotel?
How much does a double room cost per night?
List three services offered by the hotel.
questions.reponse: 24-hour security, air conditioning, restaurant, swimming pool, free parking, laundry service (any three)

questions.texte: What is the benefit of staying for 5 nights or more?
questions.reponse: Guests get a 10% discount on their stay.

questions.texte: Analyse why a suite might be a better choice for a family than a single room.
questions.reponse: A suite is better for a family because it likely has more space and can accommodate more people. It also includes breakfast and Wi-Fi, which adds value. While it is more expensive, the extra comfort and services justify the cost for a family.

enonce.texte: Complete the following sentences using the correct gerund form of the verbs in brackets.

questions.texte: (Swim) in the pool is very relaxing.
She suggested (book) a suite for the weekend.
We are looking forward to (visit) the hotel restaurant.
They finished (pack) their bags and left.
(Save) money for accommodation is important for travellers.

intitule: Writing a Dialogue: Inquiring about Accommodation

enonce.texte: Write a dialogue between a customer and a hotel receptionist inquiring about accommodation. Use at least three gerunds in the dialogue.

questions.reponse:
Sample answer:

Receptionist: Good morning! Welcome to Sunny Hills Hotel. How can I help you?

Customer: Good morning! I would like to inquire about accommodation for three nights.

Receptionist: Certainly. What type of room are you interested in? We have single rooms, double rooms, and suites.

Customer: I'm travelling with my family. Which room would be best for us?

Receptionist: I recommend booking a suite. It can accommodate up to four people and includes breakfast and Wi-Fi.

Customer: That sounds perfect! How much does it cost per night?

Receptionist: The suite costs 45,000 CFA per night. However, staying for five nights or more gives you a 10% discount.

Customer: We only need three nights. Do you have any other services?

Receptionist: Yes, we have a swimming pool, a restaurant, laundry service, and free parking. Guests also enjoy swimming in the pool and relaxing in the garden.

Customer: That's wonderful! I'm interested in booking the suite. What do I need to do?

Receptionist: You can fill out this registration form and pay a deposit. We accept cash, mobile money, and credit cards.

Customer: Great! I'm ready to fill out the form. Thank you for your help!

Receptionist: You're welcome! We look forward to hosting you.

intitule: Creating a Brochure for a Hotel

enonce.texte: Create a brochure for a hotel or guesthouse in your city. Include the following information: hotel name, location, room types, prices, services, and contact details. Use at least two gerunds in your brochure.

questions.reponse:
Sample answer:

GREEN GARDEN GUESTHOUSE

Location: 456 Green Valley Road, Douala

Accommodation:

  • Standard Room: 10,000 CFA/night
  • Deluxe Room: 18,000 CFA/night (includes breakfast)
  • Family Suite: 30,000 CFA/night (includes breakfast and Wi-Fi)

Services: 24-hour security, air conditioning, restaurant, swimming pool, parking, laundry service

Special Offers: Enjoy staying at our guesthouse for 7 nights or more and receive a 15% discount. Guests love relaxing in our beautiful garden and swimming in our pool.

Contact: 677-456-7890 or email: info@greengardenguesthouse.cm

enonce.texte: Read the sentences and identify the gerund in each one.

questions.texte: I enjoy reading books about travel.
She is interested in learning about different cultures.
We are looking forward to visiting the new hotel.
The best part of the trip was exploring the city.

enonce.texte: Complete the conversation between a guest and a hotel receptionist. Use gerunds where appropriate.

questions.texte:
Guest: Good morning! I would like to ask about your rooms. What types of rooms do you have?

Receptionist: Good morning! We have single, double, and family rooms. Are you interested in (book) a specific type?

Guest: I'm travelling with my wife and two children. I think (stay) in a family room would be best.

Receptionist: That's a good choice. The family room has two bedrooms and a living area. It also includes breakfast.

Guest: That sounds perfect! How much does it cost?

Receptionist: It costs 35,000 CFA per night. But if you stay for more than three nights, you get a discount.

Guest: Great! We plan to stay for five nights. I like (save) money.

Receptionist: In that case, you will get a 10% discount. Also, we have a swimming pool and a gym. Many guests enjoy (relax) in the pool after a long day.

Guest: Wonderful! I look forward to (relax) at your hotel.
